name: pokemon-champions-assistant
description: Unofficial, local-only Android battle assistant for Pokemon Champions.

scripts.test: npm run check && npm run android:test-engine && npm run check:licenses
scripts.android:assemble: npm run check:licenses && npm run android:assets && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/android/run-gradle.ps1 :app:clean :app:assembleDebug && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/android/check-apk-release.ps1 -ApkPath android-app/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-arm64-v8a-debug.apk -ExpectedAbi arm64-v8a && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/android/check-apk-release.ps1 -ApkPath android-app/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-x86_64-debug.apk -ExpectedAbi x86_64
scripts.android:assemble-release: npm run check:licenses && npm run android:assets && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/android/run-gradle.ps1 :app:clean :app:testDebugUnitTest :app:lintRelease :app:assembleRelease && npm run android:verify-release
scripts.android:verify-release: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/android/check-apk-release.ps1 -ApkPath android-app/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-arm64-v8a-release.apk -ExpectedAbi arm64-v8a && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/android/check-apk-release.ps1 -ApkPath android-app/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-x86_64-release.apk -ExpectedAbi x86_64
scripts.recognition:vision:predict:labeled: python tools/recognition/pokemon-vision-pipeline.py predict --crop-mode team-preview-safe-zone --use-labeled-roi-templates --labeled-template-labels dataset/labels.csv --labeled-template-images-dir dataset/real_train --labeled-template-scope same-side --augment-count 1 --side-weights opponent:phash=0,edge=0.4,color=0.2,template=0.4 --labeled-template-bonus 0.04
